spec.expr: sum by(code, method, route) (rate(aetherlay_http_request_duration_seconds_sum{code="200"}[5m])) / sum by(code, method, route) (rate(aetherlay_http_request_duration_seconds_count{code="200"}[5m]))

spec.description: You want this to be as close to 0 as possible. A high value might indicate that the pods are taking too long to process each request.
spec.title: In-Flight Requests

spec.description: Allow scrolling down a bit further to avoid issues with the UI when hovering over the last graphs.
spec.title: Empty space

spec.expr: sum by (chain, exported_endpoint) (rate(aetherlay_health_check_total{status="success"}[5m])) / sum by (chain, exported_endpoint) (rate(aetherlay_health_check_total[5m])) * 100

spec.description: You want this to be as close to 0 as possible. A high value might indicate that the pods are taking too long to process each request.
spec.title: In-Flight Requests (instant)
